---
title: 'Three (3) ways God speaks to us, setting us free with his Truth.'
date: '2019-12-09T06:56:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Musings'
---

<h3>
<b>NO HIDING: Lies are poison to LIFE. You cannot live with lies, you can only die by them.&nbsp;</b></h3>
<br />
In this article, we discuss how lies are only ever negative, how truth actually sets you free, and how to hear God so you can gain access to new levels of freedom.<br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><img height="400" src="https://scontent-ort2-2.xx.fbcdn.net/v/t1.0-9/78359494_751089572057400_2828920569318080512_n.jpg?_nc_cat=106&amp;_nc_ohc=PCDZzx0rWJwAQmBfWahhhmkFJ0dvD1fiG5Pa0m8m6Cdjy7-nuxpXCsQ_Q&amp;_nc_ht=scontent-ort2-2.xx&amp;oh=31ef669e640fec84e24cec30b9045cbf&amp;oe=5E705192" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;" width="324" /></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Photo shared on Facebook by&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=751089568724067&amp;set=a.248258222340540" target="_blank">Safe Sheep: Church Abuse Awareness</a><br />
May also be first created at <a href="https://me.me/i/it-is-time-to-unlearn-the-things-you-learned-from-fb8b42a4ca9c4efb9e1bdae59f14807d" target="_blank">Me.Me</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<h4>
<b>Unlearning Wound's Lies</b></h4>
<br />
As we go through life, the enemy works overtime to sell us his lies. Due to our own woundedness and the woundedness of others, we begin to accept certain lies, bad theology, and unproductive paradigms (ways of seeing the world).<br />
<br />
Sometimes it can be tempting to think of these lies as "self-protective", but in reality they are self-harm. There is no actual protection in them. We did develop them to protect ourselves, yes. But in reality, they are not protecting us (<i>they never were</i>) they are killing us, slowly poisoning us.<br />
<br />
I myself have been faced with this dread:<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>If I give up this lie, what awful ugly truth will I have to face? I don't think I'll survive if I had to face that truth. I'd probably kill myself.</i>&nbsp;</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>And yet... That "truth" is another lie.</i></blockquote>
<br />
If you believe the "truth" beneath the lie would kill you, then that "truth" you think you see is itself another layer of lies. Discovering truth is incapable of killing you.<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<b><i>Truth has only one outcome: FREEDOM</i></b></blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
<b>The Truth Will Make Your Free</b></h4>
<br />
As we heal from those lie-wounds, we must unlearn many things and replace them with Truths of God that set us free.<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>“<u>If </u>you </i><u>continue in My word</u><i>, you are truly My disciples. <u>32Then </u>you will know the truth, and <u>the truth will set you free</u>.”&nbsp;<a href="https://biblehub.com/john/8-32.htm" target="_blank">John 8:31-32</a>&nbsp;Emphasis Added</i></blockquote>
<br />
True Freedom (wholeness, healing, joy, clarity) only comes from first accepting and then walking out Truth in replacement of the lies. And True-Truth only comes from being bathed in God's Word. But notice the IF statement.<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i><b>IF </b>you continue in my word... <b>THEN </b>you will know... <b>AND</b> the truth will set you free.&nbsp;</i></blockquote>
<br />
Abiding in The Word is the pre-requisite to knowing Truth, which is the pre-requisite to being Free.<br />
<br />
<br />
<b><i>What that doesn't mean: Read Your Bible and Pray More (a better Knowledge of Good, wrong tree)</i></b><br />
<br />
The Pharisees proved that men can read "the Bible" and be no closer to the Truth than an ape is to writing a doctoral thesis. Reading your Bible is no guarantee that you will know the truth. Reciting a list of special requests and hoping they broke the cloud barrier isn't going to help you know the truth either.<br />
<br />
<br />
<b><i>What that does mean: Spend time with Jesus (The Word Himself) (Tree of Life)</i></b><br />
<br />
Spending actual time with the actual, living, ever-present, Jesus is the answer. Jesus is the Living Word of God. Until the Father's words are spoken by Jesus through the Holy Spirit into your heart, where they come alive inside of you... you are a dead piece of wood, not a living tree.<br />
<br />
When the Holy Spirit speaks a Truth into your heart, your eyes open, as though scales fell off of them. You see for the first time. You see the lie for what it really is.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
<b>Three Common Ways God Speaks:</b></h4>
<br />
<b>1. The Written Word (Bible)</b><br />
<br />
Didn't I just say the Bible isn't it? Sort of. The Bible is not the Word of God, it contains the Word of God. It is perfect, inerrant, infallible, untampered with. There are no errors or mistakes in the Bible. However, if God isn't speaking his Word to you, it's a life-less dead book in your hands. So open the Bible, but this time instead of studying it like a religious text, try this... say out loud:<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>Daddy (God)(Pappa), you always have something to say, what do you want to say today?</i></blockquote>
<br />
Then read as you feel led. If you have no special leading, just start somewhere, or where you left off. But keep paying attention to you gut. What's sticking out to you? Have you read the same sentence a few times? Sit and chew on that. Let it soak. See what He might be saying.<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>2. Community (People)</b><br />
<br />
God uses people. When you wall yourself off from people, ignore wise counsel, go after what you want even after you've been warned by people who love you... pain is coming. Pastors, Mentors, Parents, Friends, Counselors, Acquaintances at Church, even little kids in a grocery tore aisle, could all be used to speak something into your heart.<br />
<br />
Be mindful of the things you heart. Not every lesson is for you. Not every lesson is for now. Not everything everyone says is God. But if you start to notice a pattern? If a lot of people are saying similar things? If several people made observations you didn't want to hear? God's probably trying to tell you something.<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>3. Other (a bunch of other ways).&nbsp;</b><br />
<br />
God's BIG. Really big. He can speak a language that only you speak because he speaks your heart's cry. God Speaks Darrell. He speaks Connor, Preston, Bob, Debbie, JoAnn, Mike, Theresa, Shandra, Melissa, (insert your name here).<br />
<br />
He could speak to you through an eagle flying in the sky, the last leaf hanging on a branch, a phrase you keep seeing repeated in writing, from people, everywhere you look.<br />
<br />
He has a billion-plus ways of getting you to notice he's speaking. The only things He refuses to do are override your Free Will (he won't do it, he paid the blood of Jesus to leave that choice up to you) and he won't yell over you. He won't barge in. He will wait to be invited.<br />
<br />
Stop.<br />
<br />
Be Present.<br />
<br />
God's speaking.<br />
<br />
That speaking leads to TRUTH.<br />
<br />
That Truth leads to FREEDOM.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
<b>Your Turn: Comment on this post</b></h4>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>Are there any lies or bad theology that you've picked up that you are holding on to because you think they protect you from a greater truth?&nbsp;</i></blockquote>
